extension.summary: Subtitle Suite for download, dual-subtitle playback, sync, and AI translate
extension.description:
Kodi subtitle suite for download, dual subtitles, SmartSync, and AI translation.
The addon opens from the subtitle search screen and supports: - Multi-provider subtitle download with sync-likelihood ranking - Smart start folder selection (current video directory first) - Auto matching for two preferred subtitle languages - Manual fallback with fewer navigation steps - Smart Sync for large subtitle timing drift - Existing dual-subtitle style and timing options
extension.news:
beta 0.9.1 (2026-03-21) - Settings redesigned: vertical sidebar menu, plain language labels, inline help - Subtitle downloading enabled by default - Improved "I Feel Lucky" workflow: consistent sync dialog, graceful fallback, 90s timeout, auto-cleanup - Fixed all credential and API key fields always visible in settings - Migrated to Kodi 19+ (Python 3) only
beta 0.9 (2026-03-13) - Renamed add-on id from service.subtitles.dualsubtitles to service.subtitles.subtitlesuite - Add-on display name is now short and clean: Subtitle Suite - Added first-run profile settings migration from the old add-on id
beta 0.8 (2026-03-13) - Rebranded addon name to Subtitle Suite (Download, SmartSync, Dual Subtitle, AI Translate) - Improved provider diagnostics in log: each provider now logs result counts per search run - Improved SubDL movie search using IMDb id when available and less strict query parameters - Added Podnadpisi retry on transient 5xx errors to reduce one-off empty runs - Added optional BSPlayer provider integration (disabled by default; enable in downloader settings)
beta 0.7 (2026-03-13) - Added multi-provider subtitle download support: OpenSubtitles, Podnadpisi, and SubDL (optional API key) - Added sync-likelihood badges in subtitle download results: [SYNC], [LIKELY], [?] - Improved download ranking to prioritize likely in-sync releases using local filename heuristics - Added provider credential skip warnings so one misconfigured provider does not block the others - Provider/ranking approach inspired by a4kSubtitles ideas, implemented in DualSubtitles-native architecture
beta 0.6 (2026-03-13) - Faster subtitle loading flow in Kodi: no AI translation prompt inside regular dual-subtitle loading - Added "Restore Subtitle Backup..." action in the add-on menu - Unified backup behavior for Smart Sync and AI translation (backups go to the DualSubtitles folder) - Smart Sync now lets you choose apply mode: replace original, save as new .smartsync.srt, or playback-only - Improved picker filtering so generated subtitle files are hidden from translation/sync source pickers - Better filename language detection for tags like eng, pt-BR and zh-Hant
beta 0.5.1 (2026-03-12) - Smart Sync is now manual-only by default; optional auto prompt mode can be enabled in settings - Added Smart Sync progress dialog during sync stages - Smart Sync backup/temp artifacts now go to a DualSubtitles subfolder near the movie - Improved subtitle picker ordering and filtering to avoid selecting generated/older noisy files first - Added option to sync a second subtitle with the same reference in one Smart Sync run
beta 0.4.1 (2026-03-11) - Added manual menu option to run Smart Sync on demand - Added manual menu option to run subtitle translation on demand - Smart Sync still asks before running in automatic mismatch flow
beta 0.4 (2026-03-11) - Added Smart Sync for large subtitle drift (separate from Auto Shift) - Smart Sync now detects likely mismatch and asks whether to run sync - Added manual target/reference selection (reference can be any .srt in video folder) - Added low-confidence flow with optional AI anchor fallback - Synced target subtitle is saved with backup at *.srt.bak; temporary playback fallback is used if writing fails
v2.2.0 (2026-03-11) - Added a popup choice when preferred subtitles are missing: translate or continue without translation - Added source subtitle picker for translation (choose any .srt in the video folder) - Added support to translate both preferred languages from one source subtitle when both are missing - Improved translation flow so the user controls translation per playback
v2.1.0 (2026-03-11) - Added optional OpenAI translation for partial auto-match results - Writes translated subtitle files next to the source subtitle (for example Movie-ru.srt) - Added translation progress dialog and OpenAI settings (API key, model, batch size, timeout) - Improved single-subtitle fallback when only one preferred language is found
v2.0.0 (2026-03-10) - Rebranded as Dual Subtitles - Removed single subtitle and Kodi-settings selection modes - Added preferred language auto-match in current video folder - Added smarter browse start folder and last-used subtitle folder fallback
extension.license: GNU GENERAL PUBLIC LICENSE. Version 3, 29 June 2007
